title: 人像写实摄影图
description: A {argument name="photography style" default="photorealistic portrait with shallow depth of field and soft bokeh"} of a {argument name="subject" default="young Japanese woman"} looking back over her shoulder at the camer
prompt_raw: A {argument name="photography style" default="photorealistic portrait with shallow depth of field and soft bokeh"} of a {argument name="subject" default="young Japanese woman"} looking back over her shoulder at the camera with a {argument name="expression" default="gentle smile"}. She is wearing a {argument name="attire" default="light beige kimono with orange maple leaf patterns"} and a gold obi. Her dark hair is styled in an elegant updo with loose strands framing her face, and she wears small pearl earrings. The background features an {argument name="setting" default="autumn garden with vibrant red maple leaves"}, with bright red foliage framing the top left and a heavily blurred, soft background creating a serene, cinematic atmosphere.
prompt_preview: A {argument name="photography style" default="photorealistic portrait with shallow depth of field and soft bokeh"} of a {argument name="subject" default="young Japanese woman"} looking back over her shoulder at the camer
prompt_display_cn:
案例「photography style」属于摄影写实。这是一张摄影写实类案例，重点在真实镜头感、人物/物体质感、光线、景深、环境和摄影语言。适合改成商业摄影、人像摄影、产品摄影、纪实照片或电影剧照。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A 【photography 风格：照片写实 肖像 with shallow depth of field and soft bokeh】 of a 【subject：young Japanese woman】 looking back over her shoulder at the camera with a 【expression：gentle smile】. She is wearing a 【attire：光线 beige kimono with orange 地图le leaf patterns】 and a gold obi. Her dark hair is 风格d in an elegant updo with loose strands framing her face, and she wears small pearl earrings. The 背景 features an 【setting：autumn garden with vibrant red 地图le leaves】, with bright red foliage framing the top left and a heavily blurred, soft 背景 creating a serene, 电影感 atmosphere.
prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【拍摄主题】的摄影写实画面。

主体：
画面主体是【主体对象】，处于【动作/状态】，具有真实自然的细节。

场景：
背景环境为【场景地点】，包含【环境元素】，整体氛围为【氛围】。

摄影语言：
使用【镜头类型/焦段】，构图为【构图方式】，光线为【光线条件】，景深为【景深效果】。

质感要求：
皮肤/材质/物体细节真实，避免塑料感和过度磨皮。画面像真实摄影作品。

输出要求：
比例为【画面比例】，风格为【摄影风格】。
